arts.ttl: Barcelona spring huge Marcus Rashford SURPRISE: Man Utd star travels to Mallorca after BAN threat
arts.sum: After Rashford was signed on a loan deal from Manchester United, the Catalan side had major headaches getting him registered in time to play the opening competitive match of the season. Joan Garcia, who signed from Espanyol in a high-profile summer deal, will start in goal as Marc-Andre ter Stegen is missing due to injury while Wojciech Szczesny is another player who is not registered yet.

arts.ttl: Uncertainty reigns over Barcelona new signing’s shirt number ahead of Mallorca encounter
arts.sum: Barcelona summer signing Joan Garcia will travel to Mallorca this morning with the confidence of knowing that he will be able to play in their opening league match. arts.ttl: Barcelona forward will travel to Mallorca with the squad amid registraion uncertainty
arts.sum: After a lot of speculation, FC Barcelona were finally able to register new signing Joan Garcia in La Liga in time for their season opener against RCD Mallorca this evening.
